hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB checks into risk-based routing and audit-ready onboarding workflows that preserve evidence and ensure consistent compliance decisions across customers and entities.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding reviews struggle with inconsistent rules
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and duplicated effort when decision rules vary across providers and customer types. This fragmentation undermines consistent risk-based routing and weakens audit trails for onboarding at VASPs and digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates identity, corporate and sanctions checks with risk-based routing and decision rules to create a unified onboarding workflow that supports consistent reviews and preserves audit-ready evidence.
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider results through risk-based rules, routing, case reviews and decision logging to manage structured onboarding approvals.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond KYC checks. One onboarding layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and evidence to enable consistent, auditable and risk-based onboarding reviews.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs applying consistent onboarding policies with provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence in an enterprise-grade deployment environment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How does SFTY support risk-based onboarding decision rules
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how onboarding checks route through compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how onboarding evidence supports audit-ready decision trails
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects multiple providers for onboarding review
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP onboarding teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and PEP checks into structured onboarding workflows tailored for VASPs, enabling controlled, auditable due diligence and case management across customers and corporate entities.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage risk-based routing?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal risk policies to route onboarding reviews by jurisdiction, client type, or risk level, supporting higher-risk cases get appropriate enhanced due diligence and approval workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit trails?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed case history, decision logs and evidence packages, creating an audit-ready record showing who reviewed what, when, and which data and rules supported each onboarding decision.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers, connecting their outputs into one compliance layer without replacing them, supporting multi-provider orchestration and workflow continuity.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but turns their outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and regulatory rule updates for coordinated onboarding management.
final_title: Structure onboarding reviews with risk-based rules
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYB and screening outputs into audit-ready workflows for consistent customer and entity onboarding decisions.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
